title: PetriPrinter Protocol for 3D Printing Petri Dishes
author: Marton Gulyas
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rpfd5jn
materials: Select the requested model from the combobox

steps.title: Set parameters of the grid
steps.instruction: Set parameters of the grid. Click on the Settings menu and select the Grid element. Rows: Number of rows Columns: Number of columns Row distance: Distance between center of two petri dishes in the vertical axis Grid offset X: X offset of bottom left dish center Grid offset Y: Y offset of bottom left dish center

steps.title: Fill grid with dishes, remove lids
steps.instruction: Fill grid with dishes, remove lids

steps.title: Set parameters of the printer
steps.instruction: Set parameters of the printer. Click on the Settings menu and select the Printer element. Temperature: Printing temperature in Celsius degrees Z-offset: Printing offset on the Z axis (Height of dish spacer).

steps.title: Click into empty gray dishes where...
steps.instruction: Click into empty gray dishes where you would like to print. The selected circles become red.

steps.title: Click the + symbol to set...
steps.instruction: Click the + symbol to set the selected model in the selected petri dishes. After this the color of selected dishes becomes green. Click the - symbol if you would like to clear the selected dishes. After this the color of selected dishes become green again. If it is necessary you can select new dishes and set new models.

steps.title: Click the blue tick symbol to generate the g-code file
steps.instruction: Click the blue tick symbol to generate the g-code file. Save the g-code file.

steps.title: Open the generated g-code file with...
steps.instruction: Open the generated g-code file with the controller program of your 3D printer (preview g-code option). Or Copy the files on an sd card and insert it into the memory card socket of the 3D printer

steps.title: Preheat the heater block of 3D printer
steps.instruction: Preheat the heater block of 3D printer. Do not turn on the bed heater! Undetermined
